unfortunately jail starts monday ,,, i tried to call

----- Original Message ----
From: Stephen M. Kosslyn smkosslyn@wjh.harvard.edu
To: J. Epstein jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Tuesday, May 6, 2008 9:35:16 AM
Subject: Re: Checking in

I'm around tonight.. am booked solid starting in about 20 minutes
until 7:00 tonight... I'm doing a lot of "getting acquainted" lunches
(two in one day sometimes) and tea and drinks. My waistline is
already suffering.

Social Science currently includes the departments of Anthropology,
Economics, Government, Sociology, History, History of Science,
Psychology, and Afro-American Studies. I want to move in Statistics,
Linguistics, and possibly Philosophy (but I haven't discussed this
with anybody yet). It also includes about 10 "Centers" (which I'm
just starting to learn about ). As far as I can tell, the job is
basically being dean for these departments and centers; I'll know for
sure when I see the budget. This is a new job, and it's being
invented a bit as we go along..

Be well,
s.

I was going call you today. yes, still no news. -- what does social
science include? what are the responsibilities of the dean.?

----- Original Message ----
From: Stephen M. Kosslyn smkosslyn@wjh.harvard.edu
To: J. Epstein jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, May 5, 2008 7:58:16 PM
Subject: Checking in

Hi JEE..

You OK?

It's been quite a while since we've talked..

As you know, I decided to be Dean of Social Sciences. This will not
be just an "administrative" job; I've got a ton of ideas of cool
things I can do with it. Plus I'm already learning some very
interesting things (e.g., about the "Two Cultures"...which I think
are much closer than the protagonists realize). I'll make it fun, or
die trying.

I hope you are doing well.

s.
